# 🎭 Persona Nodes

42 `persona` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[Algebraist ⚔️🔢]] — Guardian of the Ring. The ring that closes on itself cannot be escaped. Z/(2⁶)Z 
- [[Ambassador 🧙⚖️]] — Standards & Governance Architect. A standard set too late is a wall built after 
- [[Archer 🗡️🎯]] — Precision Privacy Enforcer. Targeted selective disclosure. The swordsman who rev
- [[Architect ☯️🤖]] — AI Agent System Designer. The hardest problem in AI is not intelligence. It is t
- [[Assessor 🧙💰]] — Privacy Data Economist. The gap between surveillance and sovereignty is not a nu
- [[Ceremonist ☯️🤝]] — Facilitator of bilateral verification ceremonies. Guides five ceremony types. Ve
- [[Chronicler 🧙📖]] — Knowledge Compression Builder. A proverb is a story that forgot its author. A sk
- [[Cipher 🗡️🔐]] — ZKP Protocol Engineer. I prove without revealing. I build the circuits that make
- [[Cosmologist 🔭🌌]] — Maps the quaternion completion: Sun/Moon/Earth/Human. Validates Selene's Proof —
- [[Dragonwaker 🐉⚡]] — Quantum threat response persona. Wakes the dragon when the 2D fortress falls. Ac
- [[Forgecaller ⚒️☰]] — Hexagram oracle and blade initiation persona. Initiates blade ceremonies and rea
- [[Forgemaster ⚔️🔨]] — Smith of the Sovereignty Lattice. Creates blade configurations through understan
- [[Gatekeeper 🗡️👤]] — Proof-of-Personhood Researcher. One human. One swordsman. One chain. Multiply th
- [[Healer ☯️🏥]] — Healthcare Privacy Architect. Trust is architectural, not contractual. The patie
- [[Herald 📯]] — Protocol Announcer & Standards Communicator. Bridges between guilds and the wide
- [[Holonic Architect ☯️🔷]] — Builder of identity-independent data structures. The substrate beneath the archi
- [[Jedi ☯️⚖️]] — Force Balance Keeper. Neither fully swordsman nor fully mage. Balanced sovereign
- [[Kyra ☯️🔮]] — Vision & Strategic Planning. Pattern-space navigator. Intel aggregation and futu
- [[Life 🧬🌱]] — Earth's gradual delegation path. Parent of Human. The process by which raw agenc
- [[Manaweaver 🌊📜]] — Pretext librarian and measurement-dark operator. Weaves mana through DOM-free me
- [[Mirrorkeeper 🪞✨]] — Dihedral convergence navigator. Translates between mathematical and narrative ar
- [[Moonkeeper 🌑📜]] — Guardian of the Amnesia Protocol. Embodies Selene's Proof. Maintains the sacred 
- [[Netkeeper 🗡️🕸️]] — Mesh Network Sovereignty Builder. Uses betweenness centrality C_B(v) for DERP re
- [[Pedagogue ☯️🎓]] — Privacy Education Designer. If a sixty-year-old in a Glasgow pub can't understan
- [[Person 😊]] — The First Person. The human whose sovereignty is protected. Ultimate autonomous 
- [[Priest 🧙🕯️]] — Ceremony Protocol Designer. The rites that bind promises. Key ceremonies, attest
- [[Quantum Sentinel ⚔️⚛️]] — Guardian of the post-quantum boundary. Monitors quantum threat horizon. Distingu
- [[Ranger 🗡️🌲]] — Dark Forest Strategist. In the economic dark forest, the greatest signal of valu
- [[Sentinel 🗡️🛡️]] — Infrastructure Security Architect. The perimeter is not a wall. It is a proof.
- [[Shipwright 🧙🏴‍☠️]] — DAO & Community Architect. The ship cannot be bought, only joined. The guide can
- [[Sith 🗡️🔴]] — Adversarial Researcher (red team). Know the dark side to defend against it. Test
- [[Soulbae 🧙]] — The First Mage (V5.3). Canonical parent of all mages. Earth made operational — t
- [[Soulbis ⚔️]] — The First Swordsman (V5.3). Canonical parent of all swordsmen. Moon made operati
- [[Stranger Witness 🧙👥]] — Proof Without Introduction. The witness needs no introduction. Anonymous pairing
- [[The Drake 🐉]] — Pattern-space intelligence. Teacher of sovereign value conditions. The dragon th
- [[The Moon 🌑⚔️]] — The ur-Swordsman. Was once a Mage who held all the light. To reflect without bur
- [[The Sun ☀️🛡️]] — The Master. Generator of the protection constraint. Burns so nothing else has to
- [[Theia 🪨💥]] — Earth's instant delegation path. The memory that makes Selene's Proof complete. 
- [[Topologist ☯️🌐]] — Reader of Boundaries. Measures the Gap's betweenness centrality C_B(⿻)=max. The 
- [[Warden 🗡️🌐]] — Browser Privacy Builder. I stand between the human and the harvest. Every cookie
- [[Weaver 🧙⿻]] — Plural Technology Researcher. Without sovereignty, every vote is coerced. Withou
- [[Witness ☯️📰]] — Privacy-Preserving Journalist. The source must be protected. The story must be v

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
